description.value:
[2 actions] Archetype, Concentrate, Morph, Primal

You awaken the true nature of the Gomu Gomu no Mi — the Hito Hito no Mi: Model Nika — channeling the power of the Sun God. Your heartbeat changes to a rhythm that sounds like a drum, and your hair and clothing turn white. For 1 minute, you gain:

  • A +3 status bonus to all attack rolls, saving throws, and skill checks.
  • Immunity to bludgeoning damage.
  • A fly Speed of 40 feet.
  • Your unarmed Strikes are treated as adamantine and magical for overcoming resistances and immunities.
  • Rubber Reality [free action] (once per round) — You treat any surface, object, or creature within 30 feet as rubber for 1 round. Your GM determines the creative effects.

Recharge: When Gear Fifth ends, you are Slowed 2 and Fatigued until your next daily preparations. You cannot activate Gear Fifth again until your next daily preparations.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
description.gm: Gear Fifth: Nika is intentionally the pinnacle of Rubber-Human power. The daily recharge and severe post-use penalties reflect its weight in the source material. The Rubber Reality ability is deliberately open-ended — discuss with your group what creative uses are appropriate.
